chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Rev. Application No.138 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.7077/2021 ------------------------- 24.04.2025 Mr. Adil Channa, advocate, associate of Mr. Muhammad Ahmed Masood, counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press the instant criminal revision application, the same is accordingly dismissed along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
